arts.ttl: “Isn’t excited” | Potter doesn’t want Hammers striker target
arts.sum: West Ham target another uninspiring Bundesliga striker to replace Niclas Fullkrug. Under the current ownership, West Ham’s record when it comes to signing strikers has always been abysmal, but it somehow managed to get worse after moving to the London Stadium. arts.ttl: “It’s positive” | West Ham handed major boost as Bowen expected to make miraculous recovery
arts.sum: Jarrod Bowen is set to return much sooner than anyone expected. Despite missing multiple key players through injuries, Graham Potter’s first premier League game in charge of West Ham United was a huge success.
